sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80457" key="pelekofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πελεκοφόρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n80457.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">axe-bearer</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg006:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Arr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alan.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
